<html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Ana Epitie | Asesora Inmobiliaria de Lujo — Manresa, Barcelona</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Instrument+Serif:ital,wght@0,400;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
body{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;background:#030305;color:#fff;overflow-x:hidden}
::selection{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);color:#fff}
.gradient-heading{background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#FFF 0%,#FFF 50%,rgba(255,255,255,0.4) 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
.gradient-heading-gold{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#D4A574 0%,#F2D4B0 40%,#C9956B 70%,#E8C9A0 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
.bg-grid{background-image:linear-gradient(to right,rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:60px 60px;mask-image:radial-gradient(circle at center,black 40%,transparent 80%);-webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(circle at center,black 40%,transparent 80%)}
.hero-glow{position:absolute;width:600px;height:600px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(212,165,116,0.08) 0%,rgba(212,165,116,0.02) 40%,transparent 70%);filter:blur(80px);pointer-events:none}
.hero-glow-secondary{position:absolute;width:400px;height:400px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 0%,transparent 70%);filter:blur(60px);pointer-events:none}
.perspective-container{perspective:1200px}
.dyson-sphere{transform-style:preserve-3d;animation:rotateSphere 30s linear infinite}
.ring{position:absolute;inset:0;border:1.5px solid rgba(212,165,116,0.25);border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(212,165,116,0.06),inset 0 0 8px rgba(212,165,116,0.03)}
.core-glow{background:radial-gradient(circle at center,rgba(212,165,116,0.12) 0%,rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 30%,transparent 70%);filter:blur(25px)}
@keyframes rotateSphere{0%{transform:rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg) rotateZ(0deg)}100%{transform:rotateX(360deg) rotateY(180deg) rotateZ(360deg)}}
@keyframes pulseCore{0%{opacity:0.6;transform:scale(0.85)}100%{opacity:0.9;transform:scale(1.15)}}
@keyframes fadeInUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.animate-fade-in-up{animation:fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out forwards;opacity:0}
.delay-100{animation-delay:0.1s}.delay-200{animation-delay:0.2s}.delay-300{animation-delay:0.3s}.delay-400{animation-delay:0.4s}.delay-500{animation-delay:0.5s}.delay-600{animation-delay:0.6s}.delay-700{animation-delay:0.7s}
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);transition:opacity 0.7s ease-out,transform 0.7s ease-out}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.experience-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:20px;padding:28px 24px;transition:all 0.3s ease}
.experience-card:hover{border-color:rgba(212,165,116,0.25);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);transform:translateY(-4px)}
.service-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border-radius:24px;padding:36px 28px;transition:all 0.3s ease;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.service-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(212,165,116,0.3),transparent);opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s}
.service-card:hover::before{opacity:1}
.service-card:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03)}
.service-card-saas{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(212,165,116,0.04) 0%,rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 60%);border:1px solid rgba(212,165,116,0.12)}
.service-card-saas::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(212,165,116,0.4),transparent);opacity:1}
.service-card-saas:hover{border-color:rgba(212,165,116,0.3);background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(212,165,116,0.07) 0%,rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 60%)}
.saas-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:12px 18px;border-radius:14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.25s ease}
.saas-link:hover{border-color:rgba(212,165,116,0.35);background:rgba(212,165,116,0.06);transform:translateX(4px)}
.saas-link-icon{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}
.credential-badge{background:rgba(212,165,116,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(212,165,116,0.15);border-radius:12px;padding:16px 20px;transition:all 0.3s}
.credential-badge:hover{border-color:rgba(212,165,116,0.35);background:rgba(212,165,116,0.1)}
.cta-primary{background:#FFF;color:#000;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;padding:12px 28px;border-radius:9999px;transition:all 0.2s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;text-decoration:none}
.cta-primary:hover{background:#E2E8F0;transform:scale(1.05)}
.cta-outline{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);color:#FFF;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;padding:12px 28px;border-radius:9999px;transition:all 0.2s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;text-decoration:none;background:transparent}
.cta-outline:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05)}
.cta-gold{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#D4A574,#C9956B);color:#030305;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;padding:14px 32px;border-radius:9999px;transition:all 0.2s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:0.03em}
.cta-gold:hover{transform:scale(1.05);box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(212,165,116,0.3)}
.cta-saas{background:transparent;color:#D4A574;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:9999px;border:1px solid rgba(212,165,116,0.3);transition:all 0.2s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:0.04em;text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap}
.cta-saas:hover{background:rgba(212,165,116,0.1);border-color:rgba(212,165,116,0.5);transform:scale(1.04)}
.nav-blur{backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);background:rgba(3,3,5,0.7);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)}
.gold-divider{height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(212,165,116,0.3),transparent)}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#030305}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border-radius:3px}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25)}
.mobile-menu{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(3,3,5,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);z-index:100;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:32px}
.mobile-menu.active{display:flex}
.toast{position:fixed;bottom:32px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(100px);background:rgba(212,165,116,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(212,165,116,0.3);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-radius:12px;padding:12px 24px;z-index:200;transition:transform 0.4s ease;font-size:14px;color:#F2D4B0}
.toast.show{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}
.stat-number{font-size:36px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-0.02em;line-height:1}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
.font-serif-display{font-family:'Instrument Serif',serif}
</style>
<script>tailwind.config={theme:{extend:{fontFamily:{sans:['Inter','sans-serif'],serif:['Instrument Serif','serif']}}}}</script>
